title: Tamale Pie
intro: Tamale pie is a classic American Tex-Mex casserole inspired by tamales and chili con carne. This version keeps the cornmeal and chile backbone while replacing the traditional beef filling with vegetables.
ingredients: ¼ cup brown or green lentils
1 can Ro-Tel diced tomatoes with green chiles
steps: Add onions and celery and cook until softened.
Add sausage and break into crumbles.
Stir in beans, lentils, tomatoes, chiles, and corn.
